name: hive-mcp-openclaw-bridge
description: Reference integration with @kinthaiofficial's OpenClaw 3-layer payment governance framework. MCP server wraps Hive Gamification's 8 BOGO doors behind a 4-level hierarchical budget (Namespace → User → Agent → Task) — atomic reserve, upstream POST, settle/release. Real rails. No mock settlement.
author: Steve Rotzin <steve@thehiveryiq.com> (https://www.thehiveryiq.com)
